summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 open PRs; those are classified independently because the job explicitly says not to invent a shared canonical. The remaining 20 listed candidates were not hydrated in the provided artifact, so they are scoped needs_human for missing live state rather than classified from gitcrawl snapshot timestamps.
